sources.notes: Statement and constraints: count pairs of friends by the total slices Monocarp eats, with no shared odd-sized liked pizza.
Official editorial code groups friend masks by the number of odd pizzas, applies SOS/zeta transforms, combines rows, then inverse-transforms to recover counts by union mask.

reference_candidates.notes: Luogu candidate source; not used in this review because the official editorial code was sufficient.

annotation.summary: For every possible number of slices eaten by Monocarp, count unordered pairs of friends whose common liked pizzas contain no odd-sized pizza.
annotation.constraints: n <= 20 and m <= 5e5; masks over pizzas have size up to 2^20, so direct pair enumeration is impossible but subset transforms are feasible.
annotation.core_idea: Represent each friend by a pizza mask. Monocarp eats the complement of the union of two masks, while quarrelling happens exactly when the intersection contains an odd-sized pizza. For each mask, store counts split by how many odd pizzas it contains. After zeta-transforming over subsets, multiply rows by odd-count totals, then inverse-transform: for a union mask U, entries where cnt_odd(mask1)+cnt_odd(mask2)=cnt_odd(U) are exactly the ordered pairs with no odd pizza in the intersection and union U. Subtract self-pairs that have no odd pizzas and divide by two to get unordered distinct pairs.
annotation.complexity: O(o^2 * 2^n + o * n * 2^n + n * 2^n), where o is the number of odd-sized pizzas.
tricks: Encode liked pizza sets as bitmasks and count pairs by their union mask.
Split counts by the number of odd pizzas to enforce the no-odd-intersection condition.
Use OR convolution via zeta/SOS transform and inverse transform instead of enumerating friend pairs.

solution_variants.name: or-convolution-by-odd-count
solution_variants.summary: Build a table A[odd_count][mask] of friend counts, zeta-transform every row over subsets, convolve rows by odd-count sum, inverse-transform, and aggregate valid union masks into answer buckets by complement slice sum.
solution_variants.complexity: O(o^2 * 2^n + o * n * 2^n) time, O(o * 2^n) memory.

tags.evidence: The main aggregation is an OR convolution over friend masks, implemented by subset zeta transform and inverse transform.
tags.description: Use the OR variant of subset/FWT-style convolution, typically implemented with zeta transforms over submasks or supermasks.
tags.created_reason: The taxonomy already distinguishes AND and XOR FWT; OR convolution is a distinct common transform needed for precise retrieval.

tags.evidence: The official implementation performs SOS/zeta propagation for every odd-count row before and after combining masks.
Friend preferences, union masks, odd-pizza masks, and complement slice sums are all represented by bitmasks.
The answer counts unordered friend pairs classified by subset union and odd-intersection constraints.
